evaluation.summary: The empirical correction factor c_emp(t) remains finite, positive, and well-behaved across all 1,000‑prime windows up to 100,000 for the LDAB model in base‑210.
next_directions: Extend the validation to larger prime ranges and multiple bases to assess scalability of LDAB.
Analyze the asymptotic behavior of c_emp(t) and compare with theoretical predictions.
Investigate potential correlations between c_emp(t) and prime gap statistics.
